title: pronephrium philippinum
intro: Pronephrium philippinum, also known as Philippine fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Marattiaceae. It is native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia, and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Pronephrium philippinum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
